generated_oml:
instance ActualPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring actual position of the robot's six axes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTDataStream
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring current for each motor in the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTDataStream
]

instance MQTTDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ActualPositionSensor, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance ActualPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actual position measurements from robot axes"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity derived from actual position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current measurements for each axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for functional and logical architecture of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model for analytical simulation of robot motion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton model for behavioral aspects of robot control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling for structural modeling across requirements, functional, logical, and technical layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation and analytical modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavior modeling and state machine implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed implementation and high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for stakeholder integration and cross-platform components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for managing system complexity in DT development"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance OOSEMMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for object-oriented system engineering in DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance SPESMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for embedded systems in digital twin applications"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance SMArDTMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for agile development of digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance ACMEADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and composition"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance AADLADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for real-time system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MontiArcADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc ADL for architectural modeling of component-based systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams for component interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing joint friction using sensor data and models to provide insights for decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing dashboard visualization of joint friction insights and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on joint friction levels derived from sensor data and model analysis"
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the MABI MAX 100 serial robot system"
    base:contains ActualPositionSensor, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization is maintained through continuous live-data linking between physical and digital components, with live measurements streamed one-way from the physical system to the digital model, ensuring data-driven representations without bidirectional communication as per the digital shadow reference model."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is orchestrated via a Digital Shadow Reference Model implemented as a UML class diagram, comprising components such as Asset (physical entity), DataTrace (data points), Processing (computational logic), and Model (engineering/simulation). The Processing component consumes input data traces using simulation or engineering models to produce output data, with traceability maintained through 'originates from' associations for transitive lineage of data transformations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor time series data; network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Data is streamed via MQTT protocol, utilizing Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for interoperability and integrating with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for real-time control and data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes industry standards such as SysML for systems engineering modeling, AADL for architecture description, ACME as a framework for architecture description languages, MontiArc for component-based modeling, and Simulink for simulation. Methodologies including RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are applied to manage complexity across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer) during system development."
]
